name: Split View shows desktop and mobile labels
description: On the Preview tab, clicking the Columns (Split View) toggle button shows two preview areas labeled 'Desktop' and 'Mobile' side by side.

planSteps.description: Click the 'المعاينة' (Preview) tab in the bottom dock
Click the button with title 'عرض منقسم (مقارنة)' in the preview toolbar
Verify the text 'Desktop' is visible on the page
Verify the text 'Mobile' is visible on the page
